query:
INSERT INTO session_queued_messages (id, session_id, position, message, executor_config)
               VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
               RETURNING id AS "id!: Uuid",
                         session_id AS "session_id!: Uuid",
                         position AS "position!: i64",
                         message,
                         executor_config,
                         queued_at AS "queued_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
